---
id: validate-dataset-url
title: "Validate URL for dataset linking"
description: "Validates that a remote dataset URL is accessible and returns a supported CSV/TSV format, without creating a dataset."
sidebar_label: "Validate URL for dataset linking"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/datasets/validate-url"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Validates that a remote dataset URL is accessible and returns a supported CSV/TSV format, without creating a dataset.
